prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含原理科）最低位次约 1379→1556→1779→1616→1592，近 3 年呈先降后稳态势，2025 年基准约 1592 名；该校在贵州省物理类计划 2021–2023 年均为 95 人，2024–2025 年增至 96 人；2026 年计划大幅扩至 120 人，较 2025 年扩招 25%，显著增加招生名额，竞争结构发生明显变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 18 名，稳居全国顶尖高校前列，对高分考生持续保持强吸引力；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，涉及学术不端事件（论文数据造假通报等），可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第 26（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平，关注度尚可；历史投档异常方面，2022 年河南曾出现严重断档，2025 年亦有投档线暴跌信号，但贵州省近年位次相对平稳；土木工程 A+、城乡规划学 A+、环境科学与工程 A+、管理科学与工程 A+、建筑学 A、计算机科学与技术 A、交通运输工程 A、测绘科学与技术 A、海洋科学 A、生物学 A、风景园林学 A、工商管理 A 等 17 个学科获评 A- 及以上，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续高热，人工智能相关方向关注度上 升；土木建筑类专业持续劝退，可能影响传统王牌专业的报考热度。贵州省 2026 年高考总人数约 29.9 万，较 2025 年（约 29.7 万）小幅增加，物理类考生规模预计与 2025 年基本持平或略增；同济大学位于上海，属一线城市高校，对西南地区考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在贵州省物理类招生占比约 1.5%（2025 年），属中等偏低水平，扩招后占比将有所提升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次约 1592 名、2026 年大幅扩招 25%（竞争加剧，位次后移）、学校顶尖层次持续吸引高分考生、声誉偏负面略有抑制、抖音关注度较热、物理类考生规模基本稳定等因素，考虑声誉负面及土木劝退的微弱抑制作用，小幅回调后预测最低位次约 1801 名，区间 1596–2006 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science Category) was approximately 1379→1556→1779→1616→1592, showing a trend of initial decline followed by stabilization in recent 3 years, with a 2025 baseline of about 1592. The university's enrollment plan in Guizhou for Physics Category was 95 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 96 in 2024–2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 120 students, a 25% increase compared to 2025, substantially increasing admission slots and causing notable changes in competition structure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 18th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, consistently among the top universities in China, maintaining strong appeal to high-scoring students. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents (such as notifications of paper data fabrication), which may partially suppress some candidates' application intentions. Douyin popularity ranking is 26th (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, indicating moderate attention. Regarding historical admission anomalies, severe gaps occurred in Henan in 2022, and signals of a sharp drop in admission scores appeared in 2025, but rankings in Guizhou have been relatively stable in recent years. Disciplines such as Civil Engineering A+, Urban and Rural Planning A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Architecture A, Computer Science and Technology A, Transportation Engineering A, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A, Marine Science A, Biology A, Landscape Architecture A, Business Administration A, and 17 other disciplines have been rated A- or above, demonstrating strong disciplinary strength and providing robust support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular in society, with increasing attention on AI-related directions. Civil and architectural majors are persistently discouraged, potentially affecting the application heat for traditional flagship majors. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao participants in Guizhou is approximately 299,000, a slight increase from 2025 (about 297,000), with the scale of Physics Category candidates expected to be roughly the same or slightly higher than 2025. Tongji University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city university, exerting strong regional appeal to candidates from the southwestern region. The university's enrollment proportion for Physics Category in Guizhou is about 1.5% (2025), at a moderately low level, which will increase after expansion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of approximately 1592, a significant 25% enrollment expansion in 2026 (intensified competition, ranking shift backward), the university's top-tier level continuing to attract high-scoring candidates, slightly negative reputation with some suppression, relatively hot Douyin attention, and basically stable scale of Physics Category candidates, along with the weak inhibitory effects of negative reputation and discouraged civil engineering majors, after a slight downward adjustment, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1801, with a range of 1596–2006.

- Engineering Pilot Class (Excellence Plan Class).

Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Medical Pilot Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Robotics and Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Engineering Pilot Class (School of Transportation)
- Engineering Pilot Class (School of Civil Engineering)
- Engineering Pilot Class (School of Architecture and Urban Planning).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 1596–2006, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as reach options (Guohao Elite Class, Artificial Intelligence Top-notch Class, etc., require rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range), and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. Although civil engineering majors have top disciplinary evaluations, their social popularity is persistently discouraged; when applying, consider personal interest and industry prospects comprehensively.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年历史类（含原文科）最低位次约 312→370→263→297→362，波动较大，2025 年基准约 362 名；该校在贵州省文科/历史类计划 2021–2023 年均为 16 人，2024 年降至 12 人，2025 年进一步降至 11 人；2026 年计划继续缩至 10 人，较 2025 年缩招约 9%，名额持续收紧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 18 名，顶尖综合性大学对文科考生同样具有较强品牌吸引力；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，涉及学术不端事件；抖音热度排名第 26（较热），整体关注度中等偏上；历史投档异常方面，2022 年河南曾出现严重断档，但贵州省文科位次波动主要受招生计划调整影响；外国语言文学 A-、工商管理 A、马克思主义理论 A- 等文科相关学科获评 A- 及以上，对人文社科类专业有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业社会热度偏热（推荐），会计/财务/审计分化观望，人文科学类热度一般。贵州省历史类考生 2024 年约 9.9 万、2025 年约 9.0 万，呈逐年下降趋势；2026 年按比例估算约 9 万人左右，考生规模缩小有利于位次前移；同济大学位于上海，对西南地区文科考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在贵州省历史类招 生占比极低（约 0.2%），缩招后竞争进一步加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次约 362 名、2026 年继续缩招约 9%（名额减少，竞争加剧，位次前移）、历史类考生规模逐年下降（缓解竞争）、学校顶尖层次持续吸引高分文科考生等因素，考虑缩招幅度较大但考生减少形成对冲，小幅回调后预测最低位次约 357 名，区间 316–398 名。

- 会计学（含双学位培养项目）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) was approximately 312 → 370 → 263 → 297 → 362, with significant fluctuations; the 2025 baseline is about 362nd place. The university's enrollment plan in Guizhou for Liberal Arts/History Category was 16 students from 2021 to 2023, dropped to 12 in 2024, further dropped to 11 in 2025; the 2026 plan continues to shrink to 10 students, a reduction of about 9% compared to 2025, with quotas continuously tightening.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 18th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, a top comprehensive university with strong brand appeal to Liberal Arts candidates; in 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents; Douyin popularity ranking 26th (relatively hot), overall attention moderately high; regarding historical admission anomalies, a severe gap occurred in Henan in 2022, but fluctuations in Guizhou Liberal Arts rankings are mainly affected by enrollment plan adjustments; Foreign Language and Literature A-, Business Administration A, Marxist Theory A- and other Liberal Arts-related disciplines rated A- or above, providing certain support for humanities and social science majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has relatively high social popularity (recommended), Accounting/Finance/Auditing is divided and wait-and-see, Humanities and Sciences have average popularity. The number of History Category candidates in Guizhou was about 99,000 in 2024 and about 90,000 in 2025, showing a year-on-year decline; estimated at about 90,000 in 2026 by proportion, the shrinking candidate pool benefits ranking advancement; Tongji University is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal to Liberal Arts candidates in Southwest China; the university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou History Category is extremely low (about 0.2%), and competition further intensifies after the reduction.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 362nd, continued enrollment reduction of about 9% in 2026 (fewer spots, intensified competition, ranking advancement), year-on-year decline in History Category candidate numbers (alleviating competition), and the university's top tier continuously attracting high-scoring Liberal Arts candidates, and factoring in that the large reduction is offset by fewer candidates, after a slight adjustment, the predicted minimum ranking is about 357th, with a range of 316–398.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Law (including dual-degree programs)
- Accounting (including dual-degree programs).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- None (History Category has only 3 majors, Tier 1 already covers 2).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Humanities and Sciences Experimental Class (including Communication, German, English, Japanese, Philosophy, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: History Category has only 3 majors; with rankings within the predicted range of 316–398, Law and Accounting are Tier 1 sprint majors, while the Humanities and Sciences Experimental Class serves as a safety option. Law has relatively high social popularity, Accounting relies on the A-rated Business Administration discipline, both can be primary choices; the Humanities and Sciences Experimental Class covers multiple humanities directions, suitable for candidates with broad interests.
